title: Energy Flow Monitor
description: The Energy Flow Monitor displays a overall view of the energy flow in a building.

inputs.description: Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.

outputs.description: Calculation of CO2 savings: Co2d = Pd * CO2 The calculation of the number of trees in the user interface is based on the formulas of the Greenhouse Gas Equivalencies Calculator.
Calculation hourly or when the price changes according to the following formula: Yd = (Pd - Ed) * Pri + Ed * Pre
Calculated remaining power of the top group
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.
This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.

properties.description: Select a Spot Price Optimizer as source for the energy export price or use the parameter. Only objects from the same Miniserver can be selected!
Select a Spot Price Optimizer as source for the energy import price or use the parameter. Only objects from the same Miniserver can be selected!
